latent_bridge.isomorphism_of_friction: Decentralized resource routing under variable geometric curvature
latent_bridge.mechanism: Larvae dynamically exchange fluids (resources) adjusting to local colony density and stress (curvature). This mimics the parallel transport of vectors along a manifold where connection coefficients (Christoffel symbols) adapt to local curvature variations, maintaining resource/vector continuity across non-Euclidean spaces.

uncertainty_matrix.ambiguity_zone: The precise threshold where colony density ceases to act as a smooth manifold and fractures into discrete sub-networks.
